name: react-custom-roulette
when_to_use: 需要在 React 交付物里做带权扇区、指针和减速停靠的抽奖轮盘时用它而非手写 canvas,因为原生手写在角度映射、中奖停靠与连续动画上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能画静态圆盘,做不到稳定的扇区权重、指定奖项停靠和多阶段减速动画;该组件把这些难点收敛为 data、prizeNumber 与 mustStartSpinning 三个输入。

data_in.note: data_in 直接映射 Wheel props;data 是奖项行表,prizeNumber 是 data 的零基下标。上游把三个核心 prop 均列为必需,boot 只为静态首屏提供 false/0 默认。

data.optionSize?: 正整数 —— 默认 1,表示该奖项占几个等宽扇区

style?._default: 未提供时继承全局颜色与字体
style?.backgroundColor?: CSS color —— 默认轮换全局 backgroundColors
style?.textColor?: CSS color —— 默认轮换全局 textColors
style?.fontFamily?: string —— 默认继承全局 fontFamily
style?.fontSize?: number —— 默认继承全局 fontSize
style?.fontWeight?: number|string —— 默认继承全局 fontWeight
style?.fontStyle?: string —— 默认继承全局 fontStyle

image?.uri: string —— 图片 URL 或路径

schema.prizeNumber?: integer,0 <= value < data.length —— boot 默认 0;开始旋转时必须有效

spec.note: 组件内部绘制 canvas;宿主必须给明确像素高度,boot 默认 500px,禁止 vh/百分比高。轮盘自身按可用宽度缩放,窄容器应同时限制最大宽度。

example._why: 奖项行、中奖下标与旋转开关彼此约束,附最小原生 props 以免把下标写成奖项值。

carriers.widget: conditional:React 18 与 canvas 均可落 shadow 容器;若奖项使用外链图片或非 Web-safe 字体,还需对应 CDN 可达与跨域许可

isolation.evidence: package.json deps styled-components ^5.1.1 -> injects <style> into document.head at runtime (bundle shows 11x 'styled', 1x document.head, 1x createElement('style')). The wheel itself is drawn on <canvas> so it renders inside shadow, but the head-injected styled-components CSS does not cross the shadow boundary, so the styled wrapper/pointer layout is unstyled inside a shadow root (cosmetic, not a hard break). No document/window addEventListener found.

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a prize wheel with weighted segments, a pointer, and decelerating stop behavior in a React deliverable, instead of hand-writing canvas, because native implementations fail at angle mapping, prize-targeted stopping, and continuous animation.
en.why_valuable: AI can only draw a static wheel by default; it cannot reliably handle segment weights, stopping at a specified prize, and multi-stage deceleration. This component reduces those problems to three inputs: data, prizeNumber, and mustStartSpinning.

data_in.note: data_in maps directly to Wheel props. data is the prize-row table, and prizeNumber is a zero-based index into data. Upstream marks all three core props as required; boot provides false/0 defaults only for a static initial frame.

data.optionSize?: positive integer -- Default 1; number of equal-width segments occupied by this prize

style?._default: When omitted, inherits global colors and font
style?.backgroundColor?: CSS color -- Cycles through global backgroundColors by default
style?.textColor?: CSS color -- Cycles through global textColors by default
style?.fontFamily?: string -- Inherits global fontFamily by default
style?.fontSize?: number -- Inherits global fontSize by default
style?.fontWeight?: number|string -- Inherits global fontWeight by default
style?.fontStyle?: string -- Inherits global fontStyle by default

schema.prizeNumber?: integer,0 <= value < data.length -- boot default 0; must be valid when spinning starts

spec.note: The component draws an internal canvas. The host must have an explicit pixel height; boot defaults to 500px, and vh/percentage height is prohibited. The wheel scales to available width; narrow containers should also constrain maximum width.
